examples: Methods Rat gastric parietal cells were isolated by pronase digestion and purified by discontinuous density-gradient centrifugation.
MethodsAfter rat hippocampal or cerebral cortical neurons were isolated by pronase e, the IA currents were recorded by whole-cell patch clamp technique.
The sperm-oocyte binding was markedly inhibited by the glycopeptide from BSL degradated by pronase E, suggesting that the glycopeptide of BSL may also take part in sperm-oocyte binding.
